title: penstemon fruticosus
intro: Penstemon fruticosus, also known as shrubby penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon fruticosus include soothing sore throats, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Penstemon fruticosus include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
